TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_Haciang

S.FORM: yau a kaput sikaput tu wasu.
yau a qenuduna tu biyat qaya.
sasazay sayza biyat a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙可能一直在唱歌。

S.FORM: tmayta ta biyat a yau wasu ‘nay yau.
S.TRANSL: That dog looked at the frog.

S.FORM: timeng a tuRus ti sayza sunis a yau nani.
wasu yau na maynap ti qaya.
maynap ti qaya sunis a zau zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: (The frog) thought this child fell asleep too.

S.FORM: wiya ti mRaRiw yau biyat a yau melisit ti nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙從某個地方偷跑出去。

S.FORM: o titaanna ti na wasu yau sayza.
S.TRANSL: 可能被那隻狗看到(青蛙不見)了。
Probably the dog saw (the frog was gone).

S.FORM: inainaRana ti lazatna ya sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫他的主人,那個小孩子起床。
(The dog) kept awaking his master, that child.

S.FORM: mai ti ya biyat a yau tu.
yau ti mkikilim Ray wasu yau tu.
S.TRANSL: Even the dog kept looking for it too.

S.FORM: qadanna qadanna suzizitang ti a izaanna u.
S.TRANSL: 他把他們的椅子都弄倒了。
全部的家具和衣服都沒有。
All the things and clothes. The frog was not there.

S.FORM: tenga qemqemRas ta izayau ta biyat a yau.
Ray wawasu a yau mRaytutumuz nani.
kalaanna ti a biyat a yau.
tu mlilizaq ti a wasu aya ya lazat natu wasu a yau simpapakRunan.
S.TRANSL: 人和狗都很快樂互相擁抱。
The dog and the person were very happy and hugged each other.

S.FORM: titaanna nani yau ti ta paRpaRinan a iza zau.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到那裡有一個樹林。
They saw there were woods out there.

S.FORM: iza matiw sa izau sa naung.
tmayta tu iza ta biyat a yau nani.
yau ta izaan u yau a penay.
e izau qatiwanna ti na wasu yau mRaytututumuz nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗也跟著過去一直不停地叫。
The dog went and kept barking.

S.FORM: tu tutuzanna ya paRin a yau.
tmibuq ti ya izau penay a yau lepawna na.
nani kaRu sunis a zau na taytaanna ya paRin nani.
e tangan na paRin a yau.
qatiwanna mzaqis na sunis a yau a paRin a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩過去爬上那棵樹。
That child went there and climbed up the tree.
It turned out to be a bird.

S.FORM: ku zinta ya a ya a izau adam nayau.
S.TRANSL: (We) call that kind of bird owl.

S.FORM: yau ti izaanna ngidanna qaRat nani.
tmibuq ti sunis a yau nani.
kaRu iza wasu a yau nani.
izaanna ti na na penay tmantantanuz nani.
S.TRANSL: 被那些蜜蜂一直追來追去。
(It) was chased by the bees all around.

S.FORM: mniz ti mam mRaRaRiw qanizau na.
yau a buRang zaqis pa ita tayan zinna ya.
S.TRANSL: 有石頭,他想:我們爬到那裡。
There was a rock. ‘We will climb up there,’thought the child.

S.FORM: tenuzanna na ku a yau nani.
paRin sayza zinna ta wakina na.
S.TRANSL: He thought the antlers were a wood.

S.FORM: imetanna na sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: The child took hold of it.

S.FORM: muRetut ti sayza ya iza ya siRmuq a yau.
azasanna ti ya sunis a yau miza u m mRaRiw nani.
S.TRANSL: It took the child and ran far away.

S.FORM: tmibuq ti ya sunis a yau.
baksiwanna na na siRmuq a yau.
quni pa imu mautu syazi ta zian tadamuanku zinna sayza na siRmuq a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 你們幹麻來到我的管區那隻鹿可能說。
‘Why do you come to my place?’that deer probably said.
(The deer) threw (the child and the dog) into the river.

S.FORM: tmibuq ti sunis a yau Ray izau wasu sayza.
S.TRANSL: The child and the dog fell downwards.

S.FORM: ‘nay kaputna tu biyat a yau a izaanna tmibuq ti ta qiqidisan.
miRuq ti nani taytaanna ti na siRmuq a yau.
papapaanna ti ya ya izau ya lazatna nani.
S.TRANSL: Its owner carried it on the back.

S.FORM: timgeng u syazi tayzan sayza nani.
wiya ti sunis a yau qalimka.

S.TRANSL: It turned out that there was his frog.

S.FORM: wiya ti sia lubuna qatiwanna ti na sunis a yau Ray wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和那隻狗進到窩裡。
The child and the dog went into the den.

S.FORM: titaanna nani yau ti ya mazmun kinawsa ti a.
iza sikaput ti ya ka ya biyat a yau nani.
mtawtawa ti ya sunis a yau.
timeng a mazmun ti a biyat a yau nani.

S.TRANSL: 可能所有的(青蛙)都在唱歌。

S.FORM: timu iza ti sayza nani qawiya ti imi tmanan zinna tu.
sanuanna ti ya zau a zuma ay biyat qawiya ti imi haw.
S.TRANSL: 告訴別的青蛙,我們要回家了。
He told other frogs,‘We are going home.’

S.FORM: azu qumni wanay si qawman qawtu ni uman.
yau ti wanay zinna na sunis a yau.
